markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review AEO performance and strategize on closing the visibility gap.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AEO visibility is a critical gap (3.4%),** creating stakeholder risk with CMO Jason. The strategy is to target high-intent queries, not compete on volume.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [**The AEO score formula will be revised** to replace the sentiment metric with visibility. Rationale: Sentiment is often net-positive for B2B products and thus not a strong differentiator.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [**Content artifacts are the key to scaling.** Jackson will review them with the product team to ensure accuracy, which will reduce the current 14-article review backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**Initial data on core prompts is positive,** showing 20% visibility. This validates the targeted strategy and serves as a strong baseline for future growth.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)

## Topics

### AEO Performance & Stakeholder Risk

  - [AEO visibility is the primary performance gap, currently at 3.4%.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Goal:** Reach 8–15% visibility to be considered solid progress for this stage.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [This gap creates stakeholder risk, as CMO Jason is skeptical of AEO and has not yet seen the platform.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Frame the data by comparing Galileo to direct competitors (e.g., Langfuse), not large platforms with broad offerings (e.g., Langsmith, Datadog), to show a more accurate relative position.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)

### AEO Score Formula Revision

  - [The current AEO score formula will be revised to better reflect B2B performance.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [**Change:** Replace the sentiment metric with visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Sentiment is often net-positive for B2B products and thus not a strong differentiator.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [The revised formula will focus on three metrics:](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [Position](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [Visibility](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [Citation Share](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

### Content Strategy & Artifacts

  - [The content strategy will focus on targeting high-intent queries to differentiate Galileo, rather than competing on volume.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [**Content Artifacts:**](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
      - [Jackson will review the source material with the product team to ensure accuracy and prioritize future content.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Accurate artifacts are the key to scaling content creation and reducing the current 14-article review backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
      - [**Note:** Artifacts are living documents updated quarterly; minor inaccuracies are expected and corrected over time.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)

### Platform & Data Insights

  - [**Platform Weighting:** All AI platforms (ChatGPT, AI Overview, AI Node) are currently weighted equally in the aggregate score.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [**Feature Request:** Jackson requested the ability to segment data by individual AI platform.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This would provide a clearer signal, as platform performance varies significantly (e.g., Perplexity yields more citations, ChatGPT yields fewer).](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [**SEO as a Leading Indicator:** SEO performance is a strong signal for future AEO success, as AEO best practices are rooted in SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:** Draft a plan for Jackson to address the AEO visibility gap with CMO Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1993.0)
  - [**Jackson:**](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
      - [Review content artifacts with the product team.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
      - [Add new, relevant library prompts to the core prompt list.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [Clear the 14-article review backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/U_xLf_H9GDRNz_zjCTbqt6Yc4xU8exzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
